overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a cloaked character standing in tall grass at night, facing a massive glowing Erdtree in the distance. The atmospheric landscape includes mountains, scattered dead trees, and a distant campsite with warm lanterns, rendered with high-fidelity game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered dead trees overlooking distant campsite and massive glowing tree

leafless twisted tree with bare branches silhouetted against the sky
dark mountain silhouettes forming the horizon backdrop
warm orange lights from tents or structures in the middle distance
dense tall grass covering the ground in the foreground and midground

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a wide-open grassland at night, surrounded by dense tall grass. A massive glowing Erdtree dominates the distant center, flanked by dark mountains on the right and a leafless twisted tree on the left. Warm lantern light glows from a distant campsite in the middle ground, while the character remains stationary, observing the atmospheric landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective of a nocturnal grassland dominated by a colossal, luminous landmark. It begins with a stationary view of a cloaked character standing amidst dense tall grass, facing the massive glowing Erdtree that anchors the distant horizon. As the camera lingers, the composition emphasizes the contrast between the dark, jagged mountains to the right and a solitary, twisted leafless tree to the left. The scene then draws focus toward the middle ground, where the warm, flickering glow of a distant campsite punctuates the cool darkness of the landscape. Finally, the view settles into a wide, contemplative gaze across the vast terrain, blending the golden light of the tree and lanterns with the deep shadows of the night.
